rationale: Fresh validation re-read the TASK-081 implementation build, roadmap task, planning build, validation-gateway/file-structure/audits/roadmap/UI docs, and cited code/test files. Semantic acceptance is aligned: canonical roadmap status values are todo/in_progress/blocked/done/cancelled, task phases are implement/done, Pi schemas derive from those constants, architecture guard fails on workflow drift, active dogfood queue no longer emits deprecated research/implement/verify statuses, UI/status board no longer exposes a Verify column, and smoke tests cover in_progress/column expectations. The requested check evidence is sufficient and all requested commands passed. However the submitted implementation build is not commit-ready under current policy because publication.commit.trailers omits CodeWiki-Checks and CodeWiki-Validation entries, and its commit body stores trailer lines with literal \n escapes instead of actual line breaks. Implementation validation can use dirty working_tree_digest pre-commit, but task-close still requires a future clean immutable proof such as commit/tree/archive/remote ref. Policy blocks implementation validation until CodeWiki-Checks trailer, CodeWiki-Validation trailer_or_placeholder are recorded.
checks: Inspected src/adapters/pi/schemas.ts task status/phase schema derivation
Inspected src/application/roadmap.ts and src/application/state-artifacts.ts legacy normalization to canonical in_progress/implement
Inspected src/application/state-builders.ts, src/adapters/pi/ui/manager.ts, src/adapters/web/control-room.ts board/status lane behavior
Inspected tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs and tests/smoke/builds.test.mjs regression expectations
npm run test:features: pass (13 passed, 0 failed)
npm run test:pack: pass (npm pack --dry-run, 64 files)
working_tree_digest=sha256:000889d11f4466a03a1383627bc0c34d3a75c749abd931a2da128d45ec909b92 over base 59ebea7622e14a3faf6596b8a03a5dcb9710730f, git diff --binary HEAD, and 146 untracked files

issues.summary: Implementation build publication commit payload is not commit-ready: publication.commit.trailers lacks CodeWiki-Checks and CodeWiki-Validation entries, and publication.commit.body contains literal \n escapes rather than real trailer lines.
Implementation build is not commit-ready: CodeWiki-Checks trailer, CodeWiki-Validation trailer_or_placeholder.

blocking_questions: Update the implementation build with commit-ready title, body, trailers, checks, validation placeholder, closure brief, and file evidence before validation can pass.

isolation_requirement.reason: Implementation validation requires independent validator context and checked content proof.

isolation.notes: Fresh validator used repository artifacts/files and checks, not builder chat. Dirty digest computed after checks and before writing this validation report; digest basis: working-tree-digest-v1 using git diff --binary HEAD plus sorted untracked file path/content hashes. Dirty digest is acceptable only for implementation pre-commit validation; task-close still needs future clean immutable commit/tree/archive/remote proof.
